Example

Class BrachySolidApplicator

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API.dll

Represents a brachytherapy solid applicator part, such as a tandem or ovoid in a Fletcher Suit Delclos (FSD) applicator set. This class holds only the metadata related to the solid applicator part, and links to the catheters that are part of the solid applicator.

public class BrachySolidApplicator : ApiDataObject, IXmlSerializable

ApplicatorSetName

The name of the solid applicator set to which this part belongs.

string

string
